name: captapi
title: Captapi - Social Media Data (11 platforms, BYO key)
description: Bring your own Captapi API key. Calls the Captapi REST API (no scraping) for transcripts, AI summaries, comments, stats, search and downloads across 85 operations on 11 platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, X, Reddit, Threads, Bluesky, Pinterest, LinkedIn, Rumble).
